description: Accounts in Arabic script and Greek/Coptic numerals. Spanning several months of the year, with numeric totals written underneath specific dates. One side is headed "account of the qāḍī al-Muḥyī(?)."
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בArabic, Greek/Coptic Numerals. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
